subcodes.first_line: The Book from Our presence is unto him who hath attained unto God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast visited the House and the Master of every house [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن فاز بالله المهیمن القیوم طوبی لک بما زرت البیت و صاحب کل بیت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection of Muhammad, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
